{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322050641C2454C81F84F363A985F\"}"},"total":1210},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7163543045370544935","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"少了一星原因，父女味太浓（仅是个人感觉，这种过于溺爱。主要难适应于女娃之后接触的事物老虎，蛇啥的这也一味纵容。心有点大）当然这会是一种很让人心惊的内容适合于哪类人群。会有自己定位。4星原因，标题明确于女儿点，只是力度上有瑕疵（个人看法），系统空间我接受，这种写文也有多种。剧情也具有爽点和处事社会处事方面很好（目前200章）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1667892506,"group_id":"7042471515551435810","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"瘾士","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6sPDbsAMGRIwbhnqQxh2cCudY7v7JbshF+Dkl+9mhcS","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dd8b04e8bc274b5bb1887374744a5cda~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776703744\u0026x-signature=8YAWqmhEYgHdBAkRxYoW75yDfUs%3D","user_id":"4002694122184014","user_name":"古见同学的社交NB证"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4002694122184014","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7042471515551435810","book_info":{"abstract":"一觉醒来，豪车没了，美女也没了。身为亿万富豪的陈富贵，竟然重生回到了70年代。是浑浑噩噩过一生，还是轰轰烈烈活一世？为了娇滴滴的媳妇、可爱的闺女，他要创造属于自己的商业帝国。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/70f64a0ac49b2fe88ae4aecdea89128f","author":"半盏粗茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7042471515551435810","book_name":"重回1977，从给女儿吃肉开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":263,\"name\":\"都市种田\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967:
